hints.externalMerchantId: Optional code from the partner platform (Talabat ID, DoorDash store ID, etc.).
hints.mapLink: Optional — paste a Google Maps or Apple Maps share link.
hints.pickLocation: Search for a place or click the map to pin the restaurant. Coordinates are saved automatically.
hints.mapAutoFilled: Auto-filled from pin — you can edit.
hints.coordinates: Type or paste "lat, lng" (e.g. 29.375900, 47.977400). A Google Maps link works too — the map will jump to the spot.
hints.googleKeyMissing: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY on Vercel (and in .env.local), then redeploy.
hints.googleMapsAuthFailed: Google Maps blocked this site (referrer not allowed for this API key).
hints.googleMapsReferrerFix: In Google Cloud → Credentials → your Maps key → Website restrictions, use https://dpdadmin.vercel.app/* and http://localhost:3000/* (not only the root URL). Enable Maps JavaScript API and Places API. Ensure Vercel uses the same key.
hints.googleMapsLoadFailed: Google Maps failed to load. Check ad blockers, API key restrictions, and redeploy after env changes.
hints.status: Only published restaurants are selectable when adding a driver.
hints.logo: PNG, JPG, WebP, or SVG · max 2 MB. Shown in the restaurants list and driver app.
hints.publishRequiresLocation: To publish, add a map pin (coordinates) or at least one inclusion zone. Without either, the restaurant will be saved as Draft.

warnings.auto_downgraded_to_draft_description: Add a map pin or an inclusion zone, then publish.

orderBanner.title: Recommended go-live order

preview.title: Purge preview

analytics.unavailable: Cloudflare analytics unavailable. Set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN with Account → Analytics → Read on R2 to show request and bandwidth metrics.

recent.title: Recent uploads
recent.description: Audit log for admin panel and driver app uploads.

driverApi.title: Driver app uploads
driverApi.description: Same R2 bucket; authenticated with the driver Supabase session JWT.
driverApi.mine: GET /api/driver-uploads/mine — list with presigned read URLs

menuEditor.title: Menu Editor
menuEditor.subtitle: Rename, reorder, hide, and group sidebar items per role. Ungrouped items can sit anywhere between groups.
menuEditor.resetConfirm: Reset menu for {role} to registry defaults?
menuEditor.modeHintPanel: Group label with all items listed below in the sidebar.
menuEditor.modeHintInline: Single row in the sidebar; opens a secondary menu with its items.
menuEditor.copySectionHint: Copy saves immediately to the target role. Use “Load into editor” to preview on the current role before saving.
menuEditor.copyConfirm: Copy menu settings from {from} to {to}? This will overwrite the target role's menu.
menuEditor.loadFromDiscard: You have unsaved changes. Load from another role and discard them?
menuEditor.loadedFromDesc: Loaded settings from {role}. Save to apply to this role.

translationEditor.title: Edit translations — {locale}
translationEditor.subtitle: English is the source of truth. Save updates the locale message file.
translationEditor.englishReadOnly: English source strings are edited in src/messages/en.json.

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: Application name, logo, and font used across the admin panel
branding.appSubtitleDriverHint: Also shown as the tagline on the driver app login screen.
branding.driverAppLoginHintHelp: Helper text below the tagline on the driver mobile app login screen.
branding.logoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or SVG. Recommended 128×128 or larger. SVG scales best on all screens.

theme.title: Theme
theme.subtitle: Choose a preset or create a custom color theme for the panel
theme.noCustomThemes: No custom themes yet. Clone a preset to get started.
theme.editSubtitle: Adjust colors for light and dark mode (oklch values)

errors.saveFailed: Could not save theme. Try again.

errors.missingFields: Application name and subtitle are required.
errors.missingFile: Choose a logo file to upload.
errors.fileTooLarge: Logo must be 2 MB or smaller.
errors.invalidType: Use PNG, JPG, WebP, or SVG only.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save branding. Try again.
errors.notAuthorized: You do not have permission to change branding.

driverApp.title: Driver app settings
driverApp.subtitle: Logo, splash screen, title, and maintenance for the driver mobile app
driverApp.brandingSubtitle: Assets and title shown when the driver app launches
driverApp.logoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or SVG. Recommended 128×128 or larger.
driverApp.splashHint: PNG, JPG, or WebP. Portrait image shown on launch (max 5 MB).
driverApp.appIconHint: PNG, JPG, or WebP. Square image for the device home screen (512×512 recommended).
driverApp.maintenanceSubtitle: Separate from admin panel maintenance at Settings → Maintenance
driverApp.maintenanceOnHint: Drivers see a full-screen maintenance message; block login and in-app actions.
driverApp.maintenanceOffHint: Drivers can use the app normally.
driverApp.resetConfirm: Reset all driver app settings to defaults? Uploaded logo, splash, and app icon will be removed.
driverApp.deliveryProximitySubtitle: Universal distance limit used by the driver app when logging a delivery
driverApp.deliveryProximityHint: Driver must be within this distance of their assigned zone or one of their assigned restaurants to submit a delivery entry.
driverApp.deliveryProximityDisabledHint: Set to 0 to disable the location check.

errors.missingFields: App title and maintenance message are required.
errors.invalidProximity: Enter a whole number from 0 to 10,000 meters.
errors.notAuthorized: You do not have permission to change driver app settings.

auditLogs.title: Activity logs
auditLogs.subtitle: Track all admin panel actions with before/after details

unauthorized.title: Access denied
unauthorized.subtitle: You do not have permission to view this page
